message:
test(proptest): expand proptest_chaos (20→31) and proptest_docs_gen (20→30) (ft-2of18)

Add property tests for global injector lifecycle, multi-assertion
counting, FaultMode Debug output, schema type/description extraction,
alphabetical sorting within groups, and endpoint categorization validity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
